name: Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiary, operates a chain of drugstores in China. It processes and sells medicinal materials; and engages in the wholesale of Chinese and western medicines. As of January 31, 2019, owned 5,872 direct chain stores in Yunnan, Guizhou, Guangxi, Sichuan, Shanxi, Chongqing, Tianjin, Shanghai, Hainan, and Henan provinces. It also sells products online. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Hongxiang Yixintang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. in June 2019. Yixintang Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Kunming, China.
